title: Dropdown Button
description: Dropdown Button enables you to seamlessly combine a button and a dropdown into one unified element. It allows users to trigger actions with the button while providing additional options through the dropdown, enhancing functionality and streamlining the user interface.

sections.title: Disabled
sections.description: Shows how to disable the button and menu.

sections.title: Look
sections.description: Shows how to change the look of the button and menu.

sections.title: Color
sections.description: Shows how to change the color of the button and menu.

sections.title: Size
sections.description: Shows how to change the size of the button and menu.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the button and dropdown. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: color
props.description: Color of the button. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

props.name: look
props.description: Visual style of the button. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

props.name: text
props.description: Text label of the button. Inherited from MXButtonBaseComponent.

props.name: toggleable
props.description: Provides visual styling that indicates if the Button is active. Inherited from MXButtonBaseComponent.

props.name: selected
props.description: Indicates if the Button is selected or not. Inherited from MXButtonBaseComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Specifies the tabindex of the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: mode
props.description: Mode of the button (split or dropdown).

events.name: onClick
events.description: Emitted when the button is clicked.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emitted when the button loses focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Emitted when the button gains focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: selectedChange
events.description: Emitted when the selected state changes. Inherited from MXButtonBaseComponent.

events.name: lookChange
events.description: Emitted when the look changes. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

events.name: colorChange
events.description: Emitted when the color changes. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: textChange
events.description: Emitted when the text associated with the button changes. Inherited from MXButtonBaseComponent.

events.name: toggleableChange
events.description: Emitted when the toggleable state of the button changes. Inherited from MXButtonBaseComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Simulates a click event on the button element.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. The button click is simulated.
 */
click(): void

/**
 * Sets focus to the button and adds a focus state class.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. The button receives focus.
 */
focus(): void

/**
 * Removes the focus state class from the button.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. The button loses focus.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Closes the dropdown panel.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. The dropdown panel is closed.
 */
close(): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Registers a touched callback function (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
registerOnTouched(fn: () => void): void

/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void
